title: erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. exaltatum
intro: Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. exaltatum, also known as tall wallflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates. The health benefits of Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. exaltatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
